results.title: TG20 provides a platform for young players to showcase their talent, says Aces’ CV Milind
results.description: Anticipation is building ahead of the inaugural edition of the Hyderabad Cricket Association’s TG20, with all eight franchise captains coming together for a pre-season press conference on the eve of the tournament’s opening match at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, on Saturday evening. Representing their respective franchises were Tanay Thyagarajan (Ranga Reddy Risers), Ravi [...]

results.title: AP Sports SummaryBrief at 11:58 a.m. EDT
results.description: US reaches World Cup knockout round and wins its group with 2nd straight victory, 2-0 over Australia

results.title: NASCAR heads onto eye-popping Naval Base Coronado in its latest Cup Series race
results.description: By NATE RYAN Ryan Blaney wants to keep his eyes on the road as NASCAR returns to Southern California with a race through the bone-jarring streets of San Diego’s Coronado Island. Yet the Team Penske driver is worried about being...

results.title: Hurricanes fans jam into downtown Raleigh for team's Stanley Cup parade, celebration
results.description: The Carolina Hurricanes brought their Stanley Cup celebration to downtown Raleigh. Thousands of fans arrived hours early to line sidewalks for the team’s victory parade or packed in near the rally stage where the Hurricanes were set to cap off...
